neko.title: Weixi-chan’s neko

Did you know? 
Click the chat icon on the right side of the title bar to chat with Weixi’s neko~
about.mtf.im-mtf: I am an MtF (Male-to-Female), a member of the transgenders
about.also-weixi-yona: Of course, you can also call me "未晞 (Weixi)" or Yona.
about.about-kuriyona-name: "Kuriyona" was named with the help of Japanese, and the written Chinese character is "栗夜奈", which is pronounced as the Japanese pronunciation "クリヨナ(ku-ri-yo-na)".
about.about-weixi-name: "Weixi (未晞) is the real name I chose for myself. It comes from the line 'The reeds grow lush and dense, the white dew not yet dried' in the Qin Feng section of the Book of Songs (the Classic of Poetry). It symbolizes 'dawn' and 'rebirth'."
global.in-dev: This page is still under development or semi-finished
about.description: A cute girl who is a 17-year-old Chinese senior high school student, otaku, casual anime fan, MtF, and interest-driven developer.
about.days_on_earth: Kuriyona has been in to this world for {0} days.
